body:
Felix, thanks for following up on this — I've been meaning to circle back since our call last week. I've had a chance to dig deeper into the [Meridian Grid](companies/meridian-grid) deck you forwarded, and honestly the unit economics on their storage dispatch model are more compelling than I initially gave them credit for. That said, I do have some reservations about the regulatory exposure in ERCOT markets heading into next year, which I'd want to pressure-test before [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) gets serious about leading. Would you be open to a quick thirty-minute sync with their CEO and us together later this month? I think having both firms in the room early would help surface any gaps faster and set the tone for a cleaner co-lead structure if we both decide to move.

Amara
